lines: Nubwo ntsizwe n'ibyaha, Yesu yarankijije; Yamviriy' amaraso, Angura n'urupf' atyo. Tuzab' akaramata, Ak'ishami n'igiti
Urukundo rwa Yesu Rusaguts' ikirere ! Nta cyo twarugeraho : Ruzagumahw iteka.Ni We warumbwirije: Jye nubwo nari nduzi.
Nubwo ntsizwe n'ibyaha. Yes' andutira byose; Az' ibyo nkennye byose; Az'
umubabaro; Namuberey' imbata: Nta cyago cyampangara.
